commands: sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'cd /opt/MBUTOMS && git fetch origin main && git reset --hard origin/main'
sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'pm2 delete all 2>/dev/null || true'
sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'cd /opt/MBUTOMS/whatsapp-bridge && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs && pm2 save'

sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'pm2 jlist' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d||'[]');const p=j.find(x=>x.name==='mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge');console.log('status='+p?.pm2_env?.status);console.log('restarts='+p?.pm2_env?.restart_time);console.log('uptime_sec='+Math.floor((Date.now()-p?.pm2_env?.pm_uptime)/1000));});"

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs/mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out.log')
lines = p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines() if p.exists() else []
keys = ('Bridge is ready','Listening to group','Catch-up','Forwarding','Recorded','Failed','Scheduling reconnect','QR code','authenticated')
matched = [ln for ln in lines if any(k in ln for k in keys)]
print('--- recent bridge events ---')
for ln in matched[-30:]:
    print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
print('--- last 8 raw ---')
for ln in lines[-8:]:
    print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
PY
